data.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "[Console]::Beep(1500,400); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait('% '); Start-Sleep 0.1; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait('^{ESC}'); Start-Sleep 0.1; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait('^{ESC}'); Write-Host '🚀 Popup ativado!' -ForegroundColor Green"
